original_title: EKDV-641 What an enviable daily life with a service maid who likes me too much. Nozomi Ishihara
overview: I was having a hard time finding a job, and because of my maid's wishes (Nozomi), "Etch is prohibited until I can get a job." No matter how small you give it, whether you're cooking or taking a bath, it won't deal with you at all ... One day, when I got a good feeling for job hunting and went home triumphantly, hope found my erotic book ... orz. Although it was awkward in various ways, when I talked about how I felt good about my job hunting today, I said, "My husband, did you do well today? I was so happy that I pushed it down on the sofa and rolled it up! Sometimes it's tough, but it's also the inside out of love! I'm always energetic and cute when I'm awake ... Enjoy the "what an enviable daily life" with the glittering Nozomi Ishihara maid!
